items.objective: Introduce yourself and one family member using a short prompt card.
items.instructions: You have received a prompt card with a name, a home city, and one family member's name and job. Use the sentence patterns from this unit to introduce yourself and that family member. Speak or write at least four sentences.
successCriteria: State your name using the Менин атым pattern.
Say where you are from using the -тен / -ден + мин structure.
Name one family member and their relationship to you.
Say one fact about that family member (job, city, or name).
items.completionHint: Start with your name, then your city, then introduce the family member. Use Менин ... + family word + possessive suffix.

supportCards.title: Pattern reminder: origin statement
supportCards.body: Place name + -тен / -ден + мин. Example: Мен Ош шаарынантанмын — I am from the city of Osh. For Bishkek: Мен Бишкектенмин.

supportCards.title: Keep Менин short and flowing
supportCards.body: Менин is unstressed in a natural introduction. Let it run into the noun that follows without pausing. Menin atam sounds like one unit when spoken naturally.

items.scenario: A new neighbour is visiting your home for the first time. They ask about you and your family. Using the prompt card below, introduce yourself and one family member.
items.learnerRole: You are the host introducing yourself and your family.
